insights.title: COMPLEMENTARY_ACTIVITIES: Metalcommerce D.O.O, Higia d.o.o.
insights.description: Metalcommerce specializes in the purchase and sale of secondary raw materials, including metal recycling. Higia provides waste management services, industrial cleaning, and consulting on environmental protection and waste management. By collaborating, Metalcommerce can benefit from Higia's expertise in collecting and managing hazardous waste, while Higia can leverage Metalcommerce’s network for efficient disposal and recycling of metals.

insights.title: VALUE_CHAIN: Eco-RECYCLING doo, Dual Invest NS DOO
insights.description: Eco-RECYCLING doo focuses on mechanical recycling, while Dual Invest NS DOO is involved in the construction of residential and non-residential properties with a focus on eco-design and sustainable materials. By collaborating, Eco-RECYCLING can supply recycled materials to Dual Invest for use in their projects, promoting circular economy principles and reducing environmental impact.

insights.title: COMPLEMENTARY_ACTIVITIES: Kodeks Book, Eco-RECYCLING doo
insights.description: Kodeks Book is engaged in the sale and purchase of second-hand textbooks, promoting reuse. Eco-RECYCLING doo focuses on mechanical recycling. By collaborating, Kodeks Book can ensure that unsold or unusable books are recycled through Eco-RECYCLING, creating a closed loop for paper products.

insights.title: COMPLEMENTARY_ACTIVITIES: Higia d.o.o., Eco-RECYCLING doo
insights.description: Higia provides waste management and industrial cleaning services, while Eco-RECYCLING focuses on mechanical recycling. By collaborating, Higia can ensure that the waste collected is efficiently recycled by Eco-RECYCLING, promoting a circular economy approach to waste management.

insights.title: COMPLEMENTARY_ACTIVITIES: Metalcommerce D.O.O, Eco-RECYCLING doo
insights.description: Metalcommerce specializes in metal recycling, while Eco-RECYCLING focuses on mechanical recycling. By collaborating, Metalcommerce can supply recycled metals to Eco-RECYCLING for further processing and integration into new products, promoting a circular economy approach.

insights.title: GEOGRAPHIC_CLUSTER: Eco-RECYCLING doo, IZVV Rasadnik
insights.description: Both Eco-RECYCLING and IZVV Rasadnik are located in Novi Sad and work on circular economy topics. By collaborating, they can share knowledge and resources to promote sustainable practices within their local community.

insights.title: GEOGRAPHIC_CLUSTER: Eco-RECYCLING doo, Kodeks Book
insights.description: Both Eco-RECYCLING and Kodeks Book are located in Novi Sad and work on circular economy topics. By collaborating, they can share knowledge and resources to promote sustainable practices within their local community.

insights.description: Both Eco-RECYCLING and Metalcommerce are located in Novi Sad and work on circular economy topics. By collaborating, they can share knowledge and resources to promote sustainable practices within their local community.

insights.title: [CAPABILITY-NEED GAPS] Recycling Infrastructure Access Gap
insights.description: There is a significant need for recycling infrastructure access, but only limited capabilities are available to meet this demand.

insights.title: [VALUE CHAIN GAPS] Weakness in Collection Stage
insights.description: The collection stage of the circular economy process is underrepresented. There are only 11 entities involved in waste collection and sorting, which may lead to inefficiencies in material flows.
entities_involved: Entities involved in Waste Management & Disposal Services

insights.title: [ROLE DISTRIBUTION GAPS] Underrepresented Roles
insights.description: Several critical roles such as Citizen Associations, Media, Public Authorities, Funding, and End Users are underrepresented with less than three entities each.

insights.title: [GEOGRAPHIC GAPS] Uneven Geographic Distribution
insights.description: The circular economy actors are concentrated in a few areas while many regions have no CE presence. This can lead to accessibility issues for services.

insights.title: [ACTIVITY COVERAGE GAPS] Missing Sharing Platforms and Repair Services
insights.description: There is a notable absence of sharing platforms and repair services, which are crucial for extending product lifecycles.

insights.title: [HIGH] Establish partnerships to enhance recycling infrastructure a
insights.description:
Establish partnerships to enhance recycling infrastructure access.

Target: Recycling Infrastructure Access need cluster (11 entities)

Expected Impact: Increase the availability of recycling facilities and equipment, improving waste management efficiency.

insights.title: [MEDIUM] Promote citizen science initiatives to enhance data-driven d
insights.description:
Promote citizen science initiatives to enhance data-driven decision making in sustainable agriculture.

Target: Entities needing Data-Driven Decision Making Support (1 entity)

Expected Impact: Improve the accuracy and effectiveness of agricultural practices through community engagement.

insights.title: [MEDIUM] Develop more sharing platforms and repair services to extend
insights.description:
Develop more sharing platforms and repair services to extend product lifecycles.

Target: Entities in Use & Consumption activities (2 entities)

Expected Impact: Reduce waste by promoting reuse and extending the lifespan of products.

insights.title: [HIGH] Increase representation of underrepresented roles such as Ci
insights.description:
Increase representation of underrepresented roles such as Citizen Associations, Media, Public Authorities, Funding, and End Users.

Target: EcosystemRole entities (Citizen Associations, Media, Public Authorities, Funding, End Users)

Expected Impact: Enhance the diversity and robustness of the circular economy ecosystem by including a broader range of stakeholders.

insights.title: [MEDIUM] Expand geographic presence to underserved regions through ou
insights.description:
Expand geographic presence to underserved regions through outreach programs and partnerships.

Target: Entities distributed across 77 locations

Expected Impact: Ensure equitable access to circular economy services and reduce regional disparities.
